info.title: HttpRequestInspector:
info.description: A CLI tool to inspect HTTP requests

options.name: --port
options.description: The port to listen on. Default is 5000.

options.name: --unsecure
options.description: Accept HTTP requests instead of HTTPS.

options.name: --response-status-code
options.description:
The HTTP status code to be returned when
called. Default is 200.
